hero_subtitle: SFTY helps regulators monitor CBDC activity and tokenized assets by consolidating market signals, risk events, and workflow evidence into a secure supervisory platform.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision slows when CBDC data remains isolated
problem_description: Regulators face challenges connecting transaction activity, policy signals and risk events within fragmented supervisory tools. This limits timely oversight and complicates evidence collection for regulated digital currency compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY integrates CBDC transactions, risk signals, policy data and supervisory workflows into one auditable operating layer enabling regulators to monitor activity, manage investigations and prepare compliance evidence.
workflow_title: From cbdc activity to supervisory report
workflow_description: SFTY connects CBDC transaction data, risk signals and supervisory reviews into structured cases that preserve evidence and support regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. Supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY integrates CBDC activity, risk signals and policy data into connected supervisory workflows with case tracking, evidence logging and secure regulatory reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports regulators with secure, role-based deployment and evidence-grade logging to maintain audit-ready supervisory records in controlled government environments.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support CBDC compliance monitoring workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how supervisory teams track CBDC transaction risks
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade logs support CBDC audit trails
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe multi-provider orchestration for tokenized asset supervision
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for CBDC compliance monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides regulators a secure supervisory layer to monitor CBDC activity, link participant data, assess risk signals, and support reporting within controlled environments.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures signals, alerts, cases and decisions into connected workflows covering wallets, transactions, licensing, Travel Rule and supervisory actions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence-grade records to support audit readiness and defensible supervisory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider outputs?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple KYT, KYC, KYB, blockchain analytics and Travel Rule providers into one normalized supervisory platform.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing tools by orchestrating provider data and workflows rather than replacing underlying compliance or analytics systems.
final_title: Review CBDC compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects CBDC transaction data, risk signals and supervisory evidence into structured regulatory workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
